/usr/local/cuda-12.2/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  "--generate-code=arch=compute_60,code=[compute_60,sm_60]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_70,code=[compute_70,sm_70]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_75,code=[compute_75,sm_75]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_80,code=[compute_80,sm_80]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_89,code=[compute_89,sm_89]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_90,code=[compute_90,sm_90]" -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/geo2rdr_reramp.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/geo2rdr_reramp.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/geo2rdr_reramp.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
